mechanism: IG credit spread widening >75bp from trough has preceded 6/7 post-1960 correlation regime transitions with an 18-month lead. The credit market reprices first because it sits at the intersection of equity risk (default probability) and rates risk (duration and financing).
regime_dependence: Most reliable when not masked by covenant-lite structures and private credit opacity, which may extend lead time to 24-36 months in current environment.
